c.d: Ability for multiple users to work on the same document or project simultaneously.
Features for creating, assigning, and tracking tasks within the app.
Availability of chat, video conferencing, or other communication tools within the app.
Ease of sharing and storing files within the app for team access.
Number and quality of integrations with other popular apps and services.
How intuitive and easy to use the application is.
Level of customization available for workflows, dashboards, and other features.
Availability and functionality of the app across different operating systems and devices.
